Meaning.En: A person who freely offers to take part in an enterprise or undertake a task, typically for the benefit of others or a cause.
Meaning.Example: She has been a volunteer at the local food bank for over two years.

Situation.Vi: Một cá nhân tham gia giúp đỡ mà không nhận tiền lương.
Situation.En: An individual who helps without receiving payment.

Meaning.En: To offer to do something without being forced or paid to do it.
Meaning.Example: He volunteered to lead the cleanup effort after the storm.

Situation.Vi: Cung cấp dịch vụ hoặc hỗ trợ một cách tự nguyện trong một hoàn cảnh cụ thể.
Situation.En: Offering help or services of one’s own accord in a specific situation.

Meaning.En: A person who freely offers to take part in an enterprise or undertake a task, typically for the benefit of others or a cause.
Meaning.Example: The charity relies heavily on volunteers to run its community programs.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả người tham gia hoạt động cộng đồng không hưởng lương theo cách nói phổ biến ở Anh.
Situation.En: Describing someone participating in community work without pay, common in British English.

Meaning.Vi: tình nguyện (làm gì đó) (phiên bản Anh-Anh)
Meaning.En: To offer to do something without being forced or paid to do it.
Meaning.Example: She volunteered to help organize the school fair.

Situation.Vi: Cung cấp hỗ trợ hoặc dịch vụ một cách tự nguyện trong bối cảnh Anh-Anh.
Situation.En: Offering support or services voluntarily in a British English context.
